tools.name: users-get-current
tools.description: Use when: you need the current authenticated user's ID, name, or mention name. Returns the member record for the owner of SHORTCUT_API_TOKEN.

tools.name: users-get-current-teams
tools.description: Use when: you need to know which teams the current user belongs to. Returns a list of group (team) records.

tools.name: users-list
tools.description: Use when: you need to list all members in the workspace, resolve a name to a member UUID, or populate an owner dropdown.

tools.name: stories-get-by-id
tools.description: Use when: you need full details of a specific story by its integer ID, including workflow state, owners, labels, tasks, and custom fields.

storyPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the story.

tools.name: stories-get-history
tools.description: Use when: you need the audit trail or changelog for a story — who changed what and when.

storyPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the story.

tools.name: stories-search
tools.description: Use when: you need to find stories by keyword, owner, label, epic, iteration, workflow state, or story type. Always search before creating to avoid duplicates.

tools.name: stories-get-branch-name
tools.description: Use when: a developer asks for the suggested git branch name for a story. Returns the formatted branch name string.

storyPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the story.

tools.name: stories-create
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to create a new story. Always search first to avoid duplicates. story_type must be 'feature', 'bug', or 'chore'. Fetch workflow states with workflows-get-by-id before setting workflow_state_id. Call custom-fields-list before setting custom_fields.

workflow_state_id.description: Integer ID of the workflow state. Fetch available states with workflows-get-by-id first.

owner_ids.description: Array of member UUID strings to assign as owners.

epic_id.description: Integer ID of the parent epic.

iteration_id.description: Integer ID of the iteration (sprint) to add this story to.

labels.description: Array of label objects with a 'name' field.

deadline.description: Due date in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.

tools.name: stories-update
tools.description: Use when: you need to change any field on an existing story — state, owner, estimate, description, epic, iteration, labels, custom fields, or deadline. Fetch workflow states with workflows-get-by-id before setting workflow_state_id. Call custom-fields-list before setting custom_fields.

storyPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the story to update.

workflow_state_id.description: Integer ID of the new workflow state.

owner_ids.description: Complete replacement list of owner UUIDs.

epic_id.description: Integer ID of the parent epic.

deadline.description: Due date in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.

custom_fields.description: Array of custom field value objects. Call custom-fields-list first to get valid field and enum IDs.

tools.name: stories-upload-file
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to attach a file to a story. NOTE: This operation requires multipart/form-data which cannot be performed via this JSON HTTP tool. Inform the user that file uploads must be done through the Shortcut web UI at shortcut.com.

storyPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the story.

tools.name: stories-assign-current-user
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to assign themselves to a story. This is a two-step operation: (1) call users-get-current to get the current user's UUID, (2) call stories-get-by-id to get the current owner_ids array, (3) pass the merged owner_ids array (existing owners plus current user UUID) as the owner_ids parameter here.

storyPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the story.

owner_ids.description: The complete new owner_ids array: existing owners merged with the current user UUID. Must be pre-computed by the model.

tools.name: stories-unassign-current-user
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to remove themselves from a story's owners. This is a two-step operation: (1) call users-get-current to get the current user's UUID, (2) call stories-get-by-id to get the current owner_ids array, (3) pass the filtered owner_ids array (existing owners minus current user UUID) as the owner_ids parameter here.

storyPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the story.

owner_ids.description: The complete new owner_ids array: existing owners with the current user UUID removed. Must be pre-computed by the model.

tools.name: stories-create-comment
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to add a comment to a story.

storyPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the story.

text.description: The Markdown text of the comment.

tools.name: stories-create-subtask
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to create a brand-new story and immediately make it a sub-story (subtask) of an existing parent story.

parentStoryPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the parent story.

name.description: Title of the new subtask story.

tools.name: stories-add-subtask
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to link an existing story as a sub-story under a parent story.

childStoryPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the story to become a sub-story.

parentStoryPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the parent story.

tools.name: stories-remove-subtask
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to detach a sub-story from its parent, making it a top-level story again. Sets parent_id to null.

childStoryPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the sub-story to detach.

tools.name: stories-add-task
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to add a checklist task (not a sub-story) to a story.

storyPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the story.

complete.description: Whether the task is already complete. Defaults to false.

tools.name: stories-update-task
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to update a checklist task on a story — mark it complete, rename it, or change its owner.

storyPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the story.

taskPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the task.

owner_ids.description: Array of member UUID strings to assign to this task.

tools.name: stories-add-relation
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to link two stories with a relation. Valid verbs: 'relates to', 'blocks', 'blocked by', 'duplicates', 'duplicated by'. Endpoint is /story-links (not /relationships).

storyPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the source story.

verb.description: Relation verb: 'relates to', 'blocks', 'blocked by', 'duplicates', or 'duplicated by'.

object_id.description: The integer public ID of the target story.

tools.name: stories-add-external-link
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to add an external URL link to a story.

storyPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the story.

tools.name: stories-remove-external-link
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to remove a specific external URL from a story.

storyPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the story.

tools.name: stories-set-external-links
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to replace all external links on a story with a new set of URLs.

storyPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the story.

external_links.description: Complete replacement list of external URL strings.

tools.name: stories-get-by-external-link
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to find Shortcut stories associated with a specific external URL (e.g. a GitHub PR or issue URL).

external_link.description: The external URL to look up.

tools.name: epics-get-by-id
tools.description: Use when: you need full details of a specific epic by its integer ID, including state, stories, labels, and associated objectives.

epicPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the epic.

tools.name: epics-search
tools.description: Use when: you need to find epics by keyword, state, label, or objective. Always search before creating to avoid duplicates.

tools.name: epics-create
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to create a new epic. Always search first with epics-search to avoid duplicates.

milestone_id.description: Integer ID of the objective (milestone) to associate.

deadline.description: Due date in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.

tools.name: epics-update
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to update fields on an existing epic — name, description, state, labels, deadline, or associated objective.

epicPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the epic.

deadline.description: Due date in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.

tools.name: epics-create-comment
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to add a comment to an epic.

epicPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the epic.

text.description: The Markdown text of the comment.

tools.name: epics-delete
tools.description: Use when: the user explicitly wants to delete an epic. DESTRUCTIVE — requires confirmation protocol: (1) call epics-get-by-id to retrieve the epic, (2) display its name, ID, and story count to the user, (3) ask the user to type 'delete epic <name>' exactly, (4) only proceed on exact affirmative match.

epicPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the epic to delete.

tools.name: iterations-get-by-id
tools.description: Use when: you need full details of a specific iteration (sprint) by its integer ID.

iterationPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the iteration.

tools.name: iterations-get-stories
tools.description: Use when: you need all stories belonging to a specific iteration.

iterationPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the iteration.

tools.name: iterations-search
tools.description: Use when: you need to find iterations by name or date range. Always search before creating to avoid duplicates.

tools.name: iterations-get-active
tools.description: Use when: the user asks about the current sprint or what iteration is in progress. Returns iterations with status 'started'.

tools.name: iterations-get-upcoming
tools.description: Use when: the user asks about future/upcoming sprints or iterations not yet started. Returns iterations with status 'unstarted'.

tools.name: iterations-create
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to create a new iteration (sprint). Always search first with iterations-search to avoid duplicates. Dates must be ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD.

start_date.description: Start date in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.

end_date.description: End date in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.

tools.name: iterations-update
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to update an existing iteration — rename it, change its dates, or update its description.

iterationPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the iteration.

start_date.description: New start date in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.

end_date.description: New end date in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.

tools.name: iterations-delete
tools.description: Use when: the user explicitly wants to delete an iteration. DESTRUCTIVE — requires confirmation protocol: (1) call iterations-get-by-id to retrieve the iteration, (2) display its name, ID, date range, and story count to the user, (3) ask the user to type 'delete iteration <name>' exactly, (4) only proceed on exact affirmative match.

iterationPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the iteration to delete.

tools.name: labels-list
tools.description: Use when: you need to list all labels in the workspace, resolve a label name to an ID, or check what labels exist before creating one.

slim.description: If true, returns slim label records without story counts.

tools.name: labels-get-stories
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to see all stories tagged with a specific label.

labelPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the label.

tools.name: labels-create
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to create a new label. Always call labels-list first to confirm the label doesn't already exist.

color.description: Hex color string for the label (e.g. '#ff0000').

tools.name: custom-fields-list
tools.description: Use when: you need to discover available custom fields and their enum values before setting custom_fields on a story. Always call this before using custom_fields in stories-create or stories-update.

tools.name: objectives-get-by-id
tools.description: Use when: you need full details of a specific objective (milestone) by its integer ID, including associated epics and state.

milestonePublicId.description: The integer public ID of the objective (milestone).

tools.name: objectives-search
tools.description: Use when: you need to find objectives (milestones) by keyword or state. Always search before creating to avoid duplicates.

tools.name: teams-get-by-id
tools.description: Use when: you need details of a specific team (group) by its UUID, including its members and associated workflow IDs.

teamPublicId.description: The UUID string of the team (group).

tools.name: teams-list
tools.description: Use when: you need to list all teams (groups) in the workspace, resolve a team name to a UUID, or find which teams exist.

tools.name: projects-list
tools.description: Use when: you need to list all projects in the workspace or resolve a project name to its integer ID.

tools.name: projects-get-by-id
tools.description: Use when: you need full details of a specific project by its integer ID.

projectPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the project.

tools.name: projects-get-stories
tools.description: Use when: you need all stories belonging to a specific project.

projectPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the project.

tools.name: workflows-get-default
tools.description: Use when: you need the default workflow for a team. Fetches the team (group) record by UUID, which contains workflow_ids[]. Follow up by calling workflows-get-by-id on workflow_ids[0] to get the actual workflow states.

teamPublicId.description: The UUID string of the team (group).

tools.name: workflows-get-by-id
tools.description: Use when: you need the list of workflow states for a specific workflow by its integer ID. Always call this before setting workflow_state_id on a story to get valid state IDs.

workflowPublicId.description: The integer public ID of the workflow.

tools.name: workflows-list
tools.description: Use when: you need to list all workflows in the workspace to discover workflow IDs.

tools.name: documents-create
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to create a new Shortcut document. Content is always stored as Markdown.

tools.name: documents-get-by-id
tools.description: Use when: you need the full content and metadata of a specific Shortcut document by its UUID.

documentPublicId.description: The UUID string of the document.

tools.name: documents-update
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to update the title or content of an existing Shortcut document.

documentPublicId.description: The UUID string of the document.

tools.name: documents-delete
tools.description: Use when: the user explicitly wants to delete a Shortcut document by its UUID.

documentPublicId.description: The UUID string of the document to delete.

tools.name: documents-list
tools.description: Use when: the user wants to browse or search all Shortcut documents in the workspace.
